info.description: Production-ready RESTful API for an auto-parts e-commerce platform.
info.title: Auto-Store API

parameters.description: Category slug (filter to products in that category)
parameters.name: category

parameters.description: Product data (optional images replaces all when key present)
parameters.name: body

post.summary: Add vehicle compatibilities to a product (Admin/Vendor)

parameters.description: Compatibilities (make, model, year_start, year_end, engine, trim, notes)
parameters.name: body

parameters.description: Image file(s); form key: file (multiple allowed)
parameters.name: file

images.description:
Images replaces all product images when set (JSON key present).
Omit the key to leave images unchanged. Use [] to remove all images.
Same shape as POST /products/:id/images items: url, alt_text, display_order, is_primary.

firstName.description: Camel-case aliases for typical frontend payloads
